meaning: 塞加拉[埃及北部一村庄]
examples: A wooden artefact found on the step pyramid at Saqqara looks uncannily like a modern glider.
Harrell and Bown believe that blocks were loaded onto barges during the dry season, then floated over to the Nile during the floods to be shipped off to the monument sites at Giza and Saqqara.
The team found 17 buried pyramid-shaped structures, including one at Saqqara, famed for its numerous pyramids.
From Giza, head 15 miles south to see the Step Pyramid near the village of Saqqara.
